description: Use all available daily values; retain all primary sensors.
Require at least 18 valid hourly records per sensor-day.
Require at least 12 valid hourly records per sensor-day.
Retain only sensors with at least 75% hourly uptime over the study period.
Combine the 18-hour daily rule with the 75% period-uptime rule.
Drop sensors with any continuous missing gap longer than 30 days.
Retain only sensors with at least 50% hourly uptime over the study period.
